subcodes.first_line: O ye blessed ones! Praise be to God that ye have been confirmed by His supreme bounty and favored by the tender mercies of the Ancient Beauty—may my soul be a sacrifice unto His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خوشبختان حمد خدا را که بفیض اعظم موفق و بالطاف جمال قدم روحی لاحبائه الفدا
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Shrines and Holy places, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
